クエストを受注しているか否かの分岐の為に最初に変数に
上記のスクリプトを代入する。
代入する数字はクエストの番号
クエスト15番を受注中である！
数字が0以上なら受注中で0より下なら（有効ではない場合）
-1の数字となる。
受注していない

"Oh, President!"
"Um, um! I have a little favor to ask..."
小坂井莉緒(制服)_表情一覧_1
Rio
"Please...? If there's something I can do, I don't mind."
"Is that true? Um... Actually, I wanted to ask if you could
join me for the supermarket's time sale."
"I understand it's a shameless request, but could you please grant it?
This person really wants two of them, even though they're meant for
one person."
小坂井莉緒(制服)_表情一覧_1
Rio
"That's fine if it's just that♪"
"Ah, thank you very much! Well then, let's head to the battlefield
right away."
"It's very dangerous, so please gather your spirit, President!"
小坂井莉緒(制服)_表情一覧_2
Rio
"Eh... A battlefield? Super, right?"
"Is that so? Supermarkets are like battlefields. You must
not underestimate them."
小坂井莉緒(制服)_表情一覧_1
Rio
"S-So, is that so... I didn't know."
"If we don't give it our all, we won't obtain what we
desire. Shall we set off again?"
Galv.QUEST.activate(15);
The supermarket in the midst of a time sale. It is a battlefield where
all sorts of creatures crawl and a chaotic scene.
Rio, who ventured into such a dangerous place, bravely pushed forward
despite the intense environment making her dizzy.
小坂井莉緒(制服)_表情一覧_2
Rio
"Wh-Whaattt?! I-Is this the battlefield!?"
小坂井莉緒(制服)_表情一覧_2
Rio
"This isn't the supermarket I know."
"What are you talking about, President? This is the true form of the
Super!"
小坂井莉緒(制服)_表情一覧_2
Rio
"Wh-What, noooo!?!"
I desperately push through the crowd, but I can't seem to reach my
destination, the desired store. On top of that, I am being pushed
back, going in the opposite direction... It's like a battlefield. It's
a level of intensity that far exceeds imagination.
This kind of space is new to Rio. It's inevitable to embarrass herself
in front of battle-hardened warriors, no matter how much of a captain
of the kendo club and student council president she was.
It is truly a terrifying place. That is the supermarket in
the midst of a time sale!
"...Phew. I'm completely satisfied ♪"
小坂井莉緒(制服)_表情一覧_1
Rio
"Whew, I'm tired..."
"Thank you, President. Thanks to you, I was able to properly
get what I wanted ♪"
小坂井莉緒(制服)_表情一覧_1
Rio
"I'm happy that you're pleased..."
"Here, please accept this small token of appreciation!"
"If we have another opportunity, let's participate in the
supermarket's time sale, okay? ♪"
小坂井莉緒(制服)_表情一覧_1
Rio
"I'll, think about it."
